title: Grian's First Hermitcraft Season 6 Episode
description: Grian uploads his Season 6 debut, quickly becoming one of the server's most-watched members.

title: The Barge Opens for Business
description: Grian opens the Barge, a chaotic exchange shop that becomes a Season 6 landmark.

title: Sahara Grand Opening
description: The Sahara automated mega-store opens after months of construction by the Architechs trio.

title: Grian's Season 7 Premiere
description: Grian publishes his first Season 7 episode on launch day.

title: Mayor Campaigns Begin
description: Grian and Mumbo both launch campaigns for Hermitcraft Mayor, kicking off a server-wide election arc.

title: Grian's Season 8 Premiere
description: Grian's first Season 8 episode introduces the upside-down world gimmick.

title: Boatem Pole Begins
description: The Boatem group starts the iconic Boatem Pole build, a towering landmark of Season 8.

title: Grian's Season 9 Premiere
description: Grian's first Season 9 episode, launching a season-long narrative around the mysterious moon.

title: Grian's Season 10 Premiere
description: Grian kicks off Season 10 with his trademark chaotic starter base.

title: MumboJumbo's Season 6 Premiere
description: Mumbo publishes his first Season 6 episode, setting up his massive redstone projects.

title: Sahara Automated Store Opens
description: Mumbo's redstone engineering makes the Sahara mega-store a reality alongside Grian and Iskall.

title: MumboJumbo's Season 7 Premiere
description: Mumbo's first Season 7 episode begins his season-long quest to build a flying machine base.

title: Mumbo Runs for Mayor
description: Mumbo launches a campaign for Hermitcraft Mayor against Grian, promising change for the server.

title: MumboJumbo's Season 8 Premiere
description: Mumbo joins Season 8 but announces mid-season he will be stepping back from Hermitcraft content.

title: Mumbo Announces Hermitcraft Hiatus
description: MumboJumbo announces he is stepping back from Hermitcraft, ending his run as a core member.

title: Decked Out Opens
description: TangoTek opens Decked Out, a dungeon-crawler card game inside Hermitcraft Season 7 that becomes one of the most celebrated fan-made games in server history.

title: All Hermits Play Decked Out
description: Every active Hermit attempts TangoTek's Decked Out dungeon, generating dozens of highlight videos.

title: Decked Out 2 Construction Begins
description: TangoTek begins building Decked Out 2, the sequel to his legendary Season 7 dungeon game.

title: Decked Out 2 Final Runs
description: The last Hermits complete their final Decked Out 2 runs as Season 9 draws to a close.

title: Mycelium Resistance vs HEP
description: The server splits into the Mycelium Resistance (led by Scar) and the HEP faction over the Shopping District biome, in one of Season 7's most dramatic story arcs.

title: Xisuma's Season 9 Premiere
description: XisumaVoid returns for Season 9 with a focus on hermit-wide community events.

title: Xisuma's Season 10 Premiere
description: Xisuma opens Season 10 with a community-focused base design.

title: Mycelium Resistance Founded
description: GoodTimesWithScar founds the Mycelium Resistance to spread mycelium across the Shopping District, launching Season 7's biggest faction war.

title: Scar's Season 8 Premiere
description: Scar joins Season 8 and begins his elaborate fantasy-themed base.

title: Scar's Season 9 Premiere
description: Scar begins Season 9, continuing his tradition of elaborate decorative bases.

title: Scar's Wizard Tower Revealed
description: Scar reveals his Season 9 wizard tower build, one of the most visually striking bases of the season.

title: Scar's Season 10 Premiere
description: Scar kicks off Season 10 with ambitious build plans.

title: PearlescentMoon Joins Hermitcraft
description: PearlescentMoon joins Hermitcraft for Season 8, uploading her first episode on launch day.

title: Pearl's Season 9 Premiere
description: Pearl returns for Season 9 and begins her elaborate Clockwork City project.

title: Clockwork City Construction Begins
description: PearlescentMoon starts her Clockwork City, a steampunk mechanical city that becomes one of Season 9's most impressive builds.

title: Pearl's Moon Base Revealed
description: Pearl reveals her Season 9 moon-themed secondary base, complementing the season's lunar storyline.

title: Etho Returns for Season 9
description: EthosLab makes a celebrated return to Hermitcraft for Season 9 after a long absence.

title: Etho's Lab Season 9 Showcase
description: Etho shows off his signature underground lab base in Season 9, delighting longtime fans.

title: Etho's Season 10 Premiere
description: Etho continues his Hermitcraft run into Season 10.

title: Sahara Mega-Store Completes
description: Iskall85 helps complete the Sahara automated shopping store with Grian and Mumbo, a Season 6 marvel.

title: Iskall's Season 7 Premiere
description: Iskall begins Season 7 with plans for an enormous tree base known as the Omega Tree.

title: Omega Tree Takes Shape
description: Iskall's Season 7 Omega Tree becomes a towering centrepiece of the server landscape.

title: Impulse's Season 7 Premiere
description: ImpulseSV begins Season 7, partnering frequently with Tango and Skizzleman.

title: Impulse Joins Boatem in Season 8
description: ImpulseSV joins the Boatem group in Season 8, contributing to the iconic Boatem Pole project.

title: Impulse's Season 10 Premiere
description: ImpulseSV returns for Season 10 with his signature technical builds.

title: VintageBeef Plays Decked Out
description: VintageBeef takes on TangoTek's Decked Out dungeon in Season 7, producing memorable content.

title: VintageBeef's Season 9 Premiere
description: VintageBeef returns for Season 9 after several seasons away.

title: VintageBeef's Season 9 Base Reveal
description: VintageBeef shows off his Season 9 base design, marking his happy return to regular uploads.

title: Aque Town Founded
description: FalseSymmetry, Stressmonster101, and Hypnotizd found Aque Town, a water-themed neighbourhood in Season 7.

title: FalseSymmetry's Season 9 Premiere
description: False returns for Season 9 and begins her elaborate base build.

title: Aque Town Construction Begins
description: Stressmonster101 helps build Aque Town alongside FalseSymmetry and Hypnotizd in Season 7.

title: Stress Returns for Season 9
description: Stressmonster101 joins Season 9, continuing her long Hermitcraft tenure.

title: BdoubleO Plays Decked Out
description: BdoubleO100 streams and records his Decked Out attempts, showcasing the game to his audience.

title: BdoubleO's Season 9 Premiere
description: BdoubleO100 kicks off Season 9 with his trademark decorative building style.

title: Keralis's City District in Season 7
description: Keralis builds an elaborate city-style district in the Season 7 Shopping District.

title: Keralis's Season 9 Premiere
description: Keralis returns for Season 9 with his signature large-scale city builds.

title: ZombieCleo's Season 7 Premiere
description: ZombieCleo begins Season 7 with her creative builds and lore storytelling.

title: ZombieCleo's Season 9 Lore Build
description: ZombieCleo unveils a lore-rich build in Season 9, deepening the season's narrative elements.

title: DocM77's Season 9 Premiere
description: DocM77 begins Season 9, known for his creative and technical hybrid builds.

title: DocM77's Season 10 Premiere
description: DocM77 returns for Season 10 with new technical projects.

title: Zedaph's Season 7 Premiere
description: Zedaph begins Season 7 with his eccentric contraption-based building style.

title: Zedaph's Season 9 Premiere
description: Zedaph returns for Season 9 with inventive game-within-a-game projects.
